parameters.query: INSERT INTO appointments (patient_name, patient_phone, appointment_date, appointment_time, appointment_type, notification_status, batch_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'pending', $6) RETURNING id, patient_name, patient_phone, appointment_date, appointment_time, appointment_type, batch_id;

parameters.messageText:
=Hola {{$json.patient_name}},

Le recordamos su cita el próximo {{$json.appointment_date}} a las {{$json.appointment_time}} para {{$json.appointment_type}}.

Por favor, responda 'CONFIRMAR' para ratificar su asistencia o póngase en contacto si necesita reprogramar.

¡Gracias!

parameters.query: UPDATE appointments SET notification_status = 'sent', notification_sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, patient_phone;
UPDATE appointments SET notification_status = 'failed', error_reason = $1 WHERE id = $2;
INSERT INTO notification_records (appointment_id, phone_number, message_content, send_status, timestamp) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'success', NOW());
INSERT INTO notification_records (appointment_id, phone_number, message_content, send_status, error_reason, timestamp) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'failed', $4, NOW());

options.queryReplacement: ={{$item("Save Valid to DB").json.id}}, {{$item("Save Valid to DB").json.patient_phone}}, Recordatorio de cita enviado, {{$json.error ? $json.error.message : 'unknown'}}

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN notification_status = 'sent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sent, SUM(CASE WHEN notification_status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, SUM(CASE WHEN notification_status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending FROM appointments WHERE batch_id = $1;
SELECT patient_name, patient_phone, error_reason, retry_count FROM appointments WHERE batch_id = $1 AND notification_status = 'failed';
